description_long: A small bunch of three bananas rests on a flat, slightly stained and worn sheet, possibly paper or cardboard. The bananas are medium-sized, with yellow peels heavily speckled with brown spots, indicating advanced ripeness. Two of the bananas display commercial stickers, one blue and one red, partially visible on their curved surfaces. The stems are joined at the top, darkened and slightly shriveled, while the tips of the bananas show some darkening and minor bruising. The peels appear intact but show signs of softness and minor blemishes, with no major splits or tears. The overall appearance suggests the bananas have been left out for some time, and the surface beneath them is uneven and marked.
description: A bunch of three heavily speckled, ripe bananas with visible stickers rests on a worn, flat sheet. The bananas show darkened stems, minor bruising, and intact but blemished peels.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bananas' stems clustered together, with the peels curving outward and the tips mostly hidden.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the full length of the bananas, with stickers clearly visible and the curvature of the bunch most apparent.
description_view_2: Another side view, similar to view 1, but with a slightly different angle showing more of the banana tips and less of the stickers.
description_view_3: Rear view highlights the backs of the bananas, with the peels' speckling and blemishes most visible and the stems less prominent.
attribute_peel_condition: The banana peels are intact but show significant brown speckling, minor bruising, and some surface blemishes. There are no major tears or splits, though the texture appears soft and slightly wrinkled in places.
